title: Kitchenware Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Kitchenware Donation Programs 26 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disaster/Emergency Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness GLIDE REVITALIZATION DONATIONS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts small donations of shelf-stable food, pet food, clothing, small appliances, compact furniture, and household goods. Cannot accept large appliances or big furniture. Supports individuals and families impacted by the March 2025 floods in Douglas County. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 671-0189 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a store of used and new items including clothing, appliances, household and kitchen items, electronics, books, and linens. Offers vouchers to use at the thrift store for clothing and household goods to anyone in need. Also accepts donations. 705 First Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing and household goods vouchers: Unrestricted; once every 30 days Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (541) 791-5139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TOD'S CORNER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, household goods (including kitchen items), bedding and linens, and other items. Accepts donations of men's clothing, kitchenware, small appliances, bedding and linens, and bathroom supplies. 10202 SE 32nd Avenue Suite 601 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV who have a monthly income below 185% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-3pm Email (503) 349-4699 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER PERSONAL GOODS AND DIAPERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, hygiene items as available, and household goods, including bedding and kitchenware. Diapers are available through PDX Diaper Bank. Accepts donations of gently used clothing and household items. 8800 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Clothing and Hygiene supplies: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 771-7914 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE GRESHAM DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 464 NE 219th Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE PORTLAND DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 3969 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 1023 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE TIGARD DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 9806 SW Tigard Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 1023 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER ITEMS EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people donating furniture and appliances to those needing those items. Small items like blankets and hygiene items can be brought to the Family Resource Center. 3520 Frontage Road Reedsport, OR 97467 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Email (541) 271-9700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FOOD FOR FAMILIES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of shelf stable food items such as oils, flour, canned proteins, spices, and shelf stable milk. Also accepts donations of diapers, dog and cat food, personal and feminine hygiene products, canvas grocery bags, quart and gallon resealable plastic bags, disposable gloves, and produce bags. 3505 SE 182nd Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 220-6679 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FRIENDS OF LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMALS PICK OF THE LITTER THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store whose proceeds benefit domesticated animals in Lincoln County, both those housed at the Lincoln County Animal Shelter and those living in community households. Accepts donations of clean and working small kitchen appliances, bedding or linen, toys/games, books clothing, kitchenware and other small household items. 558 NE 1st Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Friday-Saturday 10am-4pm Donations: Thursday-Saturday 10am-3:30pm Email (541) 574-1861 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNISH HOPE DONATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accept donations of new or gently used household items, including kitchen basics such as dishes, glassware, bakeware, small appliances, utensils, pots, pans, home furniture, bedding, and cleaning supplies. 1006 SE 9th Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Monday-Saturday 9am-11am Pick up: Varies (541) 638-0657 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNITURE SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides used furniture, kitchen, household goods, and food boxes. Accepts furniture, kitchen, and household goods donations. Limited donation pick up is available. 4550 Marion Steet SE Suite C Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Furniture Distribution: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Furniture Drop Off: Friday 9am-4pm Furniture Pickup: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 754-9511 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The thrift store generates revenue to support the Gospel Rescue Mission, provides work opportunities for Mission residents, accepts donations of goods from community members, and provides assistance to those in need through a clothing voucher program. 429 SE 6th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm (541) 479-9748 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a thrift store that sells donated items, including clothing, furniture, household items, sporting goods, and other items. Net proceeds benefit the animals at the Humane Society of Central Oregon. 61220 S Highway 97 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: 7 days per week 10am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 388-3448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF BENTON COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children's clothing, personal hygiene items, linens (bedding, towels, etc.), baby bundles (newborn baby supplies and clothing), kitchen supplies, and a gift closet (for when community members can't afford to purchase gifts for special occasions). 4900 NW Hwy 99 Suite 102 Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Low-income community members in need Hours: Helpline: Monday-Thursday 9:30am-1:30pm Email (541) 757-8111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY GAP RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides furniture, kitchen items, firewood, medical equipment, personal hygiene supplies, cleaning supplies, and bedding/linens. Accepts donations of similar items. Assistance depends on availability. Follow-ups may be provided once the need is met. Eligibility: Low-income households (self-declared or referred and verified by caseworker, employer, or landlord) Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 650-0153 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF GREATER HILLSBORO GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides essential household items, including beds and bedding, linens, furniture, clothing, diapers, hygiene products, cleaning and laundry supplies, paper goods, and work boots. Donations are accepted of the items the agency distributes, with an ongoing need for couches, kitchen tables, and queen-size or smaller beds (including mattresses, box springs, and frames). Referrals to local food pantries are available. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday noon-2:30pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9:30am-noon Email (503) 917-0205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARLA'S MALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift store with books, toys, household items, new hygiene products, knick-knacks, and clothing including interview or work-appropriate attire. Offers volunteer work experience and credit recovery for students working at the store. Also accepts donations of new and gently used items. 2500 E Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Volunteers: Baker School District high school students Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 8am-11am and 1pm-4pm, closed holidays. Hours are subject to change. Summer hours: June 16th-July 17th Monday-Thursday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (541) 524-2309 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NW FURNITURE BANK NW FURNITURE BANK VANCOUVER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Launder and wash housewares donations prior to pick up. All items must be in good reuseable condition, free of pet hair, rips, and stains. All items will be inspected prior to acceptance. Pickup service available. 13503 SE Mill Plain Boulevard #114 Vancouver, WA 98684 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Pick up: Appointment required Email (360) 787-7144 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND DONATION DROP OFF DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of new, unopened, and full-size personal hygiene products such as shampoo, conditioner, and body wash. Also accepts toothpaste and toothbrushes, baby hygiene products, natural household cleaning products, high-efficiency laundry detergent, new pillows, new socks and undergarments (for adults and children), twin sheets and blankets, and kitchenware. Does not accept travel-size toiletries, used clothing or shoes, used toys, furniture, cell phones, or any item not in good, clean, working condition. 6161 SE Stark Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 1st Thursday of the month 11am-1pm, 3rd Thursday of the month 4pm-6pm Email (503) 243-5159 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells household goods, books, furniture, toys, clothing, shoes, jewelry, electronics, and various accessories to raise money to benefit animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 1169 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (541) 955-3367 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROSEBURG DREAM CENTER HOUSEHOLD GOODS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dishes, cookware, towels, sheets, blankets, and decor when available. Also accepts donations of these items. 2555 NE Diamond Lake Boulevard Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 10am-2pm and 4pm-7pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 673-5918 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHARING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells new and used appliances, clothes, electronics, and miscellaneous household goods. Accepts donations in good working condition. 107 W Bishop Way Brownsville, OR 97327 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 466-3003 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY THRIFT STORE SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used low cost goods for families in the area that have been donated. Proceeds go toward Habitat for Humanity's affordable homeownership program. Donations and volunteers welcome. 211 E Cascade Avenue Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations accepted: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-1pm Email (541) 549-1740 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL LEBANON CONFERENCE FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a food pantry, providing a 3 day supply of food. Also has a rotating supply of clothing, shoes, furniture, appliances, and other household goods supplied by donations. Food, clothing items, and household items accepted for donation. 100 Main Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Must meet federal poverty guidelines Hours: Wednesday 9am-11am and 11:30am-3pm Email (541) 258-5405 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VINA MOSES CENTER VINA'S FREE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing and shoes including interview-ready clothes, food, home goods, kitchenware (pots, pans, dish sets), and hygiene items. Workforce closet available with work boots and shoes, rain and safety gear. Shopping allowed once per month. Exceptions made for special circumstances. Accepts donations of food, clothing, bedding, linens, kitchenware, toys and games, and hygiene supplies. 968 NW Garfield Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Thrift Store: Monday/Wednesday 1pm-3pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-noon and 1pm-3pm, 1st Saturday of the month noon-3pm -Donations: Visit website for current hours Email (541) 753-1420 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GLIDE REVITALIZATION DONATIONS PROGRAM ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TOD'S CORNER CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER PERSONAL GOODS AND DIAPERS COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE DONATIONS COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE DONATIONS COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE DONATIONS FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER ITEMS EXCHANGE PROGRAM FOOD FOR FAMILIES DONATIONS FRIENDS OF LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMALS PICK OF THE LITTER THRIFT STORE FURNISH HOPE DONATION CENTER FURNITURE SHARE FURNITURE SHARE GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE LOVE INC OF BENTON COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES MARLA'S MALL MARLA'S MALL RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND DONATION PROGRAM ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE ROSEBURG DREAM CENTER HOUSEHOLD GOODS SHARING HANDS THRIFT STORE SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE ST VINCENT DE PAUL LEBANON CONFERENCE FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET VINA MOSES CENTER VINA'S FREE THRIFT STORE
